basically, right now we are using non collapsible sidebar. basically, anything this is below ipad screen size, we sidebar automatically collapses.

and on the @apps/app/src/components/app-header.tsx on left most we show the sidebar trigger icon.

whihc then opens the sidebar as a floating.

investigate all the changes to be made to app-sidebar + sidebar component for this to happen
